Truthfully, he is Lelouch vi Britannia, the eleventh prince of the Holy Britannian Empire, who went missing in Japan with his younger sister and was presumed dead.

name: L Lawliet
summary: Eccentric and reclusive genius detective who is the lead investigator on the 'Kira' case, a serial killing spree caused by the mysterious use of a supernatural notebook called the Death Note.

name: Mikasa Ackerman

name: Ken Kaneki
summary: Ken Kaneki is the main protagonist of the Tokyo Ghoul series. He is a half-ghoul, half-human hybrid who possesses incredible strength, speed, and durability. With his Rinkaku Kagune and Kakuja abilities, he can manipulate his body to adapt to any situation.

name: Guts
summary: Guts is the main protagonist of the Berserk series. He is a skilled swordsman and warrior who wields the powerful Dragon Slayer sword. With his prosthetic arm, he can also use a variety of other weapons such as hand cannons, repeater crossbows, daggers, throwing knives, and miniature bombs. His Berserker Armor allows him to achieve incredible feats of strength, speed, and agility, but at the cost of his sanity.

name: Rintarou Okabe
summary: Self-proclaimed mad scientist and the main protagonist of Steins;Gate.

name: Itachi Uchiha
summary: Itachi Uchiha is a highly skilled and powerful ninja from the Naruto series. He is known for his exceptional speed, agility, and intelligence, as well as his mastery of various jutsu techniques.

name: Makima
summary: Makima is a powerful and manipulative demon who serves as the primary antagonist of the Chainsaw Man series. She has the ability to control and manipulate others, using her powers to bend reality to her will.

name: Kakashi Hatake

name: Yuji Itadori

summary: Frieren is the primary protagonist of Frieren: Beyond Journey's End. Eighty years after defeating the demon king as a member of the hero Himmel's party, she travels the world to discover new magic while visiting places where her party traveled during their 10 year voyage to defeat the demon king, in an attempt to relive those past memories, learn more about her past comrades, and discover why such a small time period of her life could have left such a profound impact on her.

name: Rintarou Okabe

name: Maomao

name: Violet Evergarden

name: Denji

name: Alphonse Elric
